notes: Major release with user profiles, Firebase cloud sync, clean note-test page, auto-advance, same-note highlighting, and larger clefs.
Fixes staff placement accuracy, sight-reading highlighting, and version archive handling.
Initial polished MVP with adaptive note, interval, rhythm, mini sight-reading, local progress, analytics, import/export, and version switching.
Planned: named cloud login, teacher dashboards, richer MIDI support, and grand staff phrases.
